import { Container, Grid, Typography } from '@material-ui/core' import React, { useState } from 'react' import SubjectCards from '../components/SubjectCards' import kulas from '../images/kulas.png' import daks from '../images/daks.png' import phil from '../images/phil.png' import mathbg from '../images/mathbg.png' import webdev from '../images/webdevelopment.png' import webdes from '../images/webdesign.png' import js from '../images/javascript.png' import arduino from '../images/arduino.png' import engr from '../images/engineering.png' import graphicdesign from '../images/graphicdesign.png' import py from '../images/python.png' import arts from '../images/arts.png' export default function StudentDashboard() { const [subjects, setSubjects] = useState([ { title: 'Web Development', body: 'MWF (7:00AM-10:00AM)', instructor: 'Engr. Phil Cajurao', image: phil, imagebg: webdev, id: 1 }, { title: 'Web Design', body: 'TTh (1:00PM-5:00PM)', instructor: 'Engr. Nicolas Sumagaysay', image: kulas, imagebg: webdes, id: 2 }, { title: 'JavaScript Programming', body: 'MWF (7:00AM-10:00AM)', instructor: 'Engr. Phil Cajurao', image: phil, imagebg: js, id: 3 }, { title: 'Calculus', body: 'TTh (1:00PM-5:00PM)', instructor: 'Engr. Jomari Dacles', image: daks, imagebg: mathbg, id: 4 }, { title: 'Arduino', body: 'MWF (7:00AM-10:00AM)', instructor: 'Engr. Jomari Dacles', image: daks, imagebg: arduino, id: 5 }, { title: 'Numerical Methods', body: 'TTh (1:00PM-5:00PM)', instructor: 'Engr. Jomari Dacles', image: daks, imagebg: mathbg, id: 6 }, { title: 'Engineering Basics', body: 'MWF (7:00AM-10:00AM)', instructor: 'Engr. Phil Cajurao', image: phil, imagebg: engr, id: 7 }, { title: 'Graphic Designing', body: 'TTh (1:00PM-5:00PM)', instructor: 'Engr. Nicolas Sumagaysay', image: kulas, imagebg: graphicdesign, id: 8 }, { title: 'Python Programming', body: 'MWF (7:00AM-10:00AM)', instructor: 'Engr. Phil Cajurao', image: phil, imagebg: py, id: 9 }, { title: 'Art App', body: 'TTh (1:00PM-5:00PM)', instructor: 'Engr. Nicolas Sumagaysay', image: kulas, imagebg: arts, id: 10 }, ]) return (
{subjects.map(subject => ( ))}
) }
